translations: He said My Lord Indeed, I
[I] have wronged my soul so forgive
puzzle.hint: This is Prophet Moses (peace be upon him) asking Allah for forgiveness after making a mistake while trying to help someone - a powerful lesson about tawbah (repentance) and Allah's mercy.
puzzle.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى فَٱغْفِرْ لِى فَغَفَرَ لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
puzzle.verseEn: He said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me," and He forgave him. Indeed, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful.
